response.justification: Bogdan brings valuable Staff-level experience, a strong background in high-throughput distributed systems, and highly relevant recent exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and agentic workflows. However, his complete lack of Python experience—a strict must-have for the role—makes him a borderline candidate despite his otherwise excellent architectural and AI-tooling background.
strengths: Hands-on experience building AI-agent infrastructure and MCP code generators.
Demonstrated ability to design high-throughput distributed systems, previously handling millions of requests per second.
Strong ownership and technical strategy skills proven through Staff-level and Founder roles.
concerns: Lacks any demonstrated experience with Python, which is a strongly required skill for the role.
Most recent role involving AI-agent infrastructure was short-lived (approximately 6 months).
Past high-performance backend work heavily utilized DLang rather than the required Python ecosystem.
